Title: Successful submission with valid details
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. the user is on the Contact Us page
2. the user enters valid data in all mandatory fields
3. selects an inquiry type
4. completes the reCAPTCHA verification
5. clicks the Submit button
6. a confirmation message should be displayed
Expected Result: The form should be submitted successfully.

Title: Submission with missing mandatory fields
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. the user is on the Contact Us page
2. the user leaves any mandatory field empty
3. clicks the Submit button
4. validation messages should be displayed for the missing fields
Expected Result: The form should not be submitted.

Title: Submission with invalid email format
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. the user is on the Contact Us page
2. the user enters an invalid email address
3. clicks the Submit button
4. an email format error message should be displayed
Expected Result: The form should not be submitted.

Title: Submission with invalid phone number
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. the user is on the Contact Us page
2. the user enters an invalid phone number
3. clicks the Submit button
4. a phone validation error message should be displayed
Expected Result: The form should not be submitted.

Title: Submission without reCAPTCHA verification
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. the user is on the Contact Us page
2. the user completes all required fields
3. does not complete the reCAPTCHA
4. clicks the Submit button
5. a reCAPTCHA validation message should be displayed
Expected Result: The form should not be submitted.

Title: Dropdown and radio button validation
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. the user is on the Contact Us page
2. the user selects values from dropdowns and radio buttons
Expected Result: The selected values should be accepted without errors.

Title: System error during submission
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. the user is on the Contact Us page
2. a server or network error occurs during submission
3. the user clicks Submit
4. the user should be able to retry submission
Expected Result: A user-friendly error message should be displayed.

Title: Page usability and accessibility
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. the user is on the Contact Us page
2. the page is loaded
3. the form should support keyboard navigation
4. labels should be accessible to screen readers
Expected Result: All form fields should be visible and usable.
